atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports chronic problems including depression, diabetes, and asthma.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling lightheaded occasionally, particularly when walking up stairs.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling lightheaded.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is interested in adjusting his medication dosage or trying a different medication for depression.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has weaned himself off of Prozac.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports using his inhaler approximately 85% of the time when outdoor temperatures exceed 85 degrees.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports traveling with the kids to sports tournaments, leading to dietary adjustments and occasional unhealthy food choices.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling fatigued.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports chronic depression.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is diagnosed with type 2 diabetes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is diagnosed with asthma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes metformin at a dosage of 1000 mg twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes Zoloft at a dosage of 25 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes albuterol inhaler.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes symbicort at a dosage of 2 puffs twice daily.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in three months.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to arrange for a nurse visit.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a hemoglobin A1c test.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: PFTs are within normal limits.
